Sons of Samoa.description: Crips-affiliated street gang based in Long Beach, California, primarily composed of Samoan Americans and other Pacific Islanders. Founded by the 1980s, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, burglary, and extortion. Active in multiple U.S. states including Alaska, California, Missouri, Utah, and Washington.

descriptions: Sons of Samoa is affiliated with the Crips gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Sons of Samoa is a Crips -affiliated street gang

descriptions: Sons of Samoa has a rivalry with P.V.C. (Park Village Crip).
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: P.V.C. (Park Village Crip)

descriptions: Sons of Samoa is listed as an ally of Tongan Crip Gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sons of Samoa , Tongan Foe Lyfe Ganster Crip, Raymond Avenue Crips

descriptions: Nishida-gumi is an affiliated group of Sumiyoshi-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Takao Nishida, head of the affiliated Nishida-gumi, was gunned down

descriptions: Hells Angels feuded with Cycle Tramps, leading to violence.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolverhampton Hells Angels were simultaneously involved in a feud with the Cycle Tramps biker gang of Birmingham, which resulted in dozens of assaults, numerous stabbings and shootings, and several mass armed brawls in the early 1990s.

descriptions: Honghuzi were also Boxers, indicating they were part of the same movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Louis Livingston Seaman wrote about an incident in which the Honghuzi, who were also Boxers, ambushed, tortured and executed an Eight-Nation Alliance force consisting of Sikhs

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters , Immortals, Red Devils , Satans Soldiers, Vikings and the Prisoners of War

descriptions: New York mafia families intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Galloping Goose MC (Denmark) is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

Dead Rabbits.description: Irish American criminal street gang active in Lower Manhattan from the 1830s to 1850s. They were formed by disgruntled members of the Roach Guards and were known for their rivalry with the Bowery Boys. They engaged in over 200 gang battles and supported Tammany Hall politicians. Their symbol was a dead rabbit on a pike.

descriptions: The Atlantic Guards often warred with the Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: often warred with the Irish American gangs of the Five Points , most especially, the Dead Rabbits

descriptions: Bloody Tubs were allied with Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Plug Uglies, Rip Raps, Nativists, Dead Rabbits

descriptions: Bowery Boys and Dead Rabbits were long-term rivals who frequently fought.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bowery Boys often battled multiple outfits of the infamous Five Points, most notably the Dead Rabbits, with whom they feuded for decades.

descriptions: Chichesters were allies of Dead Rabbits in conflict against Bowery Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: An ally of the Dead Rabbits against the Bowery Boys

descriptions: American Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Atlantic Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Dead Rabbits and Bowery Boys were chief rivals, fought over 200 battles.
edges.evidence_quote: Their chief rival gang was the Bowery Boys

descriptions: Chichesters listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Empire Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Forty Thieves listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Kerryonians listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: O'Connell Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Plug Uglies listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Roach Guards listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Dead Rabbits splintered from Roach Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: The original Dead Rabbits were founded by disgruntled gang members of the Roach Guards

descriptions: Shirt Tails listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: True Blue Americans listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: Five Points Gang absorbed remaining members of the Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: Kelly recruited the remaining members of other Five Points gangs, such as the Dead Rabbits and Whyos, into his growing gang.

descriptions: The infobox lists Dead Rabbits as an ally of the Forty Thieves.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

descriptions: The Kerryonians were absorbed into the Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kerryonians were eventually absorbed into the growing street gangs of Five Points such as the Dead Rabbits, Roach Guards, and Chichesters.

descriptions: Plug Uglies allied with Dead Rabbits during the 1863 Draft Riots.
edges.evidence_quote: They allied themselves with the New York City Irish Dead Rabbits gang in looting New York City during the American Civil War in the Draft Riots of 1863.

descriptions: Dead Rabbits were former Roach Guard members involved in an internal feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Some former Roach Guard members were called the Dead Rabbits by the media. The internal feud was especially violent as they fought over the Five Points area.

descriptions: Shirt Tails participated in a coalition led by Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: they did participate in a coalition of gangs under the Dead Rabbits and fought against the Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside Turkish organized crime groups in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione “European 'ndrangheta connection” ... nonché esponenti della criminalità turca

Highway 61 Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in New Zealand and Australia, founded in Auckland in 1967 or 1968. Known for drug dealing, theft, rape, and murder. One of the largest motorcycle gangs in New Zealand, with membership primarily of Māori and Pacific Island ethnicities. Colors are black and gold.

descriptions: Head Hunters members killed a Highway 61 member in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: murdering rival-gang, Highway 61 , member Steven Bliss

descriptions: Hells Angels and Highway 61 were involved in a brawl, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1971, members of the Hells Angels, Highway 61, the Mongrel Mob and the Polynesian Panthers were involved in a large-scale brawl in Auckland, which resulted in numerous arrests.

descriptions: Hells Angels murdered a Highway 61 member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Seven Hells Angels received prison sentences of up to ten years for their part in the murder of Bradley Earl Haora, a nineteen-year-old Highway 61 member killed with a shotgun in Mount Eden on 29 December 1975.

descriptions: Highway 61 and Hells Angels engaged in a violent clash in 1975, resulting in fatalities and injuries.
edges.evidence_quote: One of the earliest documented violent clashes involving the Highway 61 Motorcycle Club occurred on 29 December 1975, in Auckland's Mount Eden suburb, where 19-year-old club member Bradley Earl Haora was beaten and then fatally shot in the head with a sawn-off shotgun during a confrontation with Hells Angels members at a Highway 61 property.

descriptions: Highway 61 and Lost Breed clashed at the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras, resulting in injuries and arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: At the 1979 Nelson Mardi Gras event the Lost Breed clashed with members of Highway 61 from Wellington.

descriptions: Highway 61 members murdered a member of the New Zealand Nomads, leading to convictions in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, Highway 61 members were convicted of murdering a member of the New Zealand Nomads.

descriptions: Mongrel Mob and Highway 61 fought in a brawl in 1971.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1971, members of the Hells Angels, Highway 61, the Polynesian Panthers and the Mongrel Mob gangs engaged in a large gang-related brawl in central Auckland.

descriptions: Tensions between the Nomads and Highway 61 led to the murder of a Nomad member.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, tensions heated up with the Highway 61 gang and resulted in the murder of Nomad Malcom Munns.

descriptions: Indian Mujahideen is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed , Pakistani Taliban , Hizbul Mujahideen , Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen , Al-Badr , Al Rashid Trust , Indian Mujahideen , People’s Anti-Fascist Front , Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam , Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT lists Indian Mujahideen as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Indian Mujahideen

descriptions: Indian Mujahideen is listed as a non-state ally of LeT in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: Indian Mujahideen is an ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

'Ndrina Maesano.description: The Maesano 'ndrina is a criminal organization of the 'Ndrangheta based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Calabria, with origins dating back to the late 19th century. It operates in drug trafficking, arms, counterfeit money, stolen cars, and tourism, with international connections in South America, Europe, and North Africa. Historically allied with the Arena family, it engaged in a long and bloody feud for territorial control. Despite numerous arrests and seizures, it remains one of the most powerful 'ndrine.

descriptions: The Maesano family historically allied with the Arena family, but from the 1980s they engaged in a long and bloody feud for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Erano storicamente alleati con gli Arena, contro cui a partire dagli anni ottanta del XX secolo condurranno una lunga e sanguinosa faida per il controllo criminale del territorio

descriptions: The Maesano family was once allied with the Arena family.
edges.evidence_quote: I Maesano sono una 'ndrina che opera a Isola Capo Rizzuto , un tempo alleata con gli Arena .

descriptions: The Maesano family was part of a broader criminal association that included the Favasuli family.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan nasce nella zona di Roghudi e Roccaforte del Greco , come parte di una più ampia associazione criminale formata dalle famiglie Maesano, Pangallo, Verno e Favasuli.

descriptions: The Maesano family was part of a broader criminal association that included the Pangallo family.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan nasce nella zona di Roghudi e Roccaforte del Greco , come parte di una più ampia associazione criminale formata dalle famiglie Maesano, Pangallo, Verno e Favasuli.

descriptions: The Maesano family and the affiliated Puccio clan were involved together in money laundering and other criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2011 un'operazione condotta da Carabinieri e Guardia di Finanza ha portato al sequestro di beni mobili ed immobili per un valore di 4 milioni di euro frutto delle attività criminali e di riciclaggio svolte dal clan e dall'affiliato clan Puccio.

descriptions: The Maesano family had a feud with the Stillitano family in the 1920s over control of agricultural labor.
edges.evidence_quote: negli anni 20 del XX secolo venne accertato che controllava il caporalato dell'attività agricola, cosa che provocò una faida con la famiglia Stillitano a Drosi di Rizzicone

descriptions: The Maesano family was part of a broader criminal association that included the Verno family.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan nasce nella zona di Roghudi e Roccaforte del Greco , come parte di una più ampia associazione criminale formata dalle famiglie Maesano, Pangallo, Verno e Favasuli.

descriptions: De Angelis and Orfeo were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Filleti and Orfeo were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Faillace belongs to the Locale di Sibari.
edges.evidence_quote: appartenente alla Locale di Sibari

Red Skin Kingz.description: A former Native American street gang based in Lukachukai, Arizona, founded in 2003. The gang operated primarily on the eastern side of the Navajo Nation, engaging in drug trafficking, carjacking, kidnapping, and murder. It was characterized by law enforcement as immensely violent.

descriptions: The Hauochars are long-time allies of the Alameddine network.
edges.evidence_quote: Alameddine's long-time allies, the Hauochars

descriptions: Cappello clan has an alliance with Pillera-Puntina clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella città di Catania l'alleanza stipulata varia da molte cosche: clan Pillera-Puntina

descriptions: Barrio 18 is an enemy of Sureños 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Sureños 13

descriptions: Sureños 13 is listed as an ally of Gangster Disciples in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sureños 13 , Folk Nation , Simon City Royals Tiny Rascal Gang (in Michigan)

descriptions: Criminal elements within Republika Srpska supplied arms to ETA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Batasuna , Herri Batasuna , FARC , FLB-ARB , Provisional IRA , Terra Lliure , Criminal elements within Republika Srpska (supply of arms)

descriptions: ETA received funding and weapons from associates of Radovan Karadzic in Republika Srpska.
edges.evidence_quote: ETA received funding and weapons from associates of Radovan Karadzic within the Republika Srpska, in the aftermath of the Yugoslav Wars.

descriptions: D'Alessandro and Afeltra-Di Martino were both targeted in the same 2020 operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: ai danni dei clan D'Alessandro e Afeltra-Di Martino

Trust Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in Germany, founded in 1984 from the merger of several MCs. It has 39 German chapters and additional chapters in Romania, Belgium, Thailand, and Poland. The club is considered police-relevant by the Bavarian Ministry of the Interior.

descriptions: Black Claw Kitzingen is a support club of Trust MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the support clubs are Iron Fist MC, Black Claw Kitzingen, Black Fear North.

descriptions: Black Fear North is a support club of Trust MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the support clubs are Iron Fist MC, Black Claw Kitzingen, Black Fear North.

descriptions: Black Fist MC is a support club of Trust MC in Romania.
edges.evidence_quote: There are also seven chapters in Romania along two support Black Fist chapters

descriptions: Some members of Destroyer MCs Landshut merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Devil Cobra MC Moosburg merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Free Fighters MC Erding merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Iron Fist MC is a support club of Trust MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the support clubs are Iron Fist MC, Black Claw Kitzingen, Black Fear North.

descriptions: MC Ergoldsbach merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Ranger MC Neutraubling merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Members of Thunderbirds MC joined Trust MC, founding the Munich chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1984, some Thunderbirds MC members switched to the Trust MC and thus founded the Trust MC chapter in Munich.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers originated from Los Ñetas.
edges.evidence_quote: El origen de los Chone Killers proviene de Los Ñetas

descriptions: Mexican Mafia member Espudo, from Esco Varrio Diablos, controlled gangs for the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rudy 'Crazy' Espudo (Esco Varrio Diablos – Escondido, California) was in control of the Hispanic gangs in the area and forced drug dealers to pay taxes in tribute to La eMe

descriptions: VVT and AK Aannan were engaged in a violent conflict (war) during this period.
edges.evidence_quote: In the mid 1990s to early 2000s, the VVT had an ongoing war with another Tamil gang called the AK Aannan based out of Scarborough.

descriptions: A temporary truce was established between VVT and AK Aannan in 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: There was a brief truce in 1998 after community members brokered a peace deal in a Richmond Hill Hindu temple; however, a murder a year later renewed the fighting.

descriptions: KAK considered cooperating with PFLP-EO but decided against it.
edges.evidence_quote: The meeting was to evaluate the political relevance of cooperating with Wadi Haddad's PFLP-EO in addition to George Habash's PFLP.

descriptions: The Partanna Mondello Mafia family aligned with the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosario Riccobono (boss of Partanna Mondello)

Sex Money Murder.description: A set of the Bloods street gang operating on the East Coast of the United States, founded in the Soundview section of the Bronx, New York City in 1995 by Peter 'Pistol Pete' Rollock. Originally a subset of the United Blood Nation, it later became independent after the 'Wet T-Shirt War'. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, armed robbery, assault, and murder, and has spread to the southern United States.

descriptions: Black Guerrilla Family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Black Guerrilla Family, Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Sex Money Murder is a set (subgroup) of the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Sex, Money, Murder (also known as Sex Money Murda , S.M.M. , or $.M.M. ) is a " set " of the Bloods street gang operating on the East Coast of the United States.

descriptions: Brim affiliates backed S.M.M. during the Wet T-Shirt War.
edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M., backed by Brim affiliates, asserted sovereignty from Billy and G-Shyne structures.

descriptions: Crips is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Black Guerrilla Family, Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Gangster Disciples is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Black Guerrilla Family, Gangster Disciples

descriptions: MS-13 is listed as an ally (localized alliances) in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: United Blood Nation, Pirus, MS13(Localized Alliances)

descriptions: Pirus is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: United Blood Nation, Pirus, MS13(Localized Alliances)

descriptions: S.M.M. affiliated with UBN on June 6, 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M. eventually affiliated itself with the United Blood Nation June 6, 1996

descriptions: Sex Money Murder is one of the original sets of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Sex, Money, Murder is one of the original sets (subgroups) of the United Blood Nation .

descriptions: S.M.M. gained independence from UBN after a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Over time, S.M.M. gained independence from UBN following an East Coast-wide conflict known as the "Wet T-Shirt War,"

descriptions: The Americans are aligned with the 26 and 27 prison number gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Americans are aligned to the 26 and 27 prison number gang

descriptions: Infobox lists Native Disciples as a rival of Native Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Native Gangster Disciples , Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , Native Disciples , Project Boyz , Moe Mob

La Barredora.description: La Barredora is a Mexican criminal gang based in Tabasco, formed in 2008 as a split-off from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel. It operates primarily in Acapulco and surrounding states, engaging in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and murder. The group is known for its rivalry with the Independent Cartel of Acapulco and links to the Sinaloa Cartel. Its leader, Hernán Bermúdez Requena, was captured in Paraguay in 2025.

descriptions: La Barredora is a splinter group of Beltrán Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: Fragmentación ... - Cártel Independiente de Acapulco y La Barredora en Guerrero .

descriptions: La Barredora is listed as an ally of Guerreros Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Familia Michoacana , Beltrán-Leyva Organization , Los Zetas , Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , La Barredora , CIDA , Los Talibanes , CJNG , Iguala Municipal Police , Cocula Municipal Police , Mexican Army (27th Infantry Battalion)

descriptions: The Independent Cartel of Acapulco is currently fighting La Barredora.
edges.evidence_quote: Independent Cartel of Acapulco in Guerrero, currently fighting La Barredora.

descriptions: La Barredora splintered from the Independent Cartel of Acapulco and became a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Within weeks, however, the group had splintered also, forming a new and rival group known as La Barredora.

descriptions: The infobox lists La Barredora as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Barredora, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: La Barredora split off from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminal group came into existence during the rapid decentralization of Mexico's drug trafficking organizations and as a split-off group of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.

descriptions: La Barredora was a predecessor organization founded by the same leader before Guerreros Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Su colaborador, Cleotilde Rentería, alias 'El Tilde', funda el cártel La Barredora e intenta ganar la plaza de Acapulco en el estado de Guerrero. Debido a diferencias, la organización se desintegra rápidamente. Finalmente en 2011, El Tilde funda Guerreros Unidos

descriptions: La Barredora battles the Independent Cartel of Acapulco as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel is known to battle its rival, the Independent Cartel of Acapulco

descriptions: Los Talibanes are allies of La Barredora.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Talibanes (Faction of Los Zetas in Central Mexico)

descriptions: La Barredora is affiliated with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Barredora, a Sinaloa Cartel -affiliated gang

descriptions: La Barredora has links with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: to have links with the Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Los Negros split into independent groups including La Barredora.
edges.evidence_quote: se han dividido en diferentes grupos independientes como ... La Barredora

descriptions: La Barredora is a rival of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Barredora

descriptions: La Barredora is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Barredora

descriptions: The Kitchen Irish are loosely based on the Westies.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kitchen Irish are loosely based on the Westies.

descriptions: Hells Angels founded Redlined Support Crew as a replacement puppet gang.
edges.evidence_quote: To replace the Zig Zag Crew, the Hells Angels founded a new puppet gang, the Redlined Support Crew.

descriptions: Redlined Support Crew attacked a Rock Machine ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A former member of the Zig Zag Crew, Fat Corey, who had allied himself with the Rock Machine was heard to make insulting remarks about the Hells Angels. In January 2010, Corey suffered what the police called a 'vicious beating' at the hands of the Redlined Support Crew.

descriptions: Rock Machine members were convicted of arson attacks against Redlined Support Crew properties.
edges.evidence_quote: On 10 July 2011, a business associated with the Hells Angels and the home of a Redlined Support Crew (Hells Angels puppet gang) were burned down.

Hip Sing Association.description: Chinese-American criminal organization formed as a labor group in New York City's Chinatown around 1904. Involved in Tong wars with rivals and drug trafficking with the Kuomintang. Established chapters across the US. Some branches have recently transitioned to legitimate fraternal organizations.

descriptions: The Flying Dragons were affiliated with the Hip Sing Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: they were affiliated with the Hip Sing Tong

descriptions: Hip Sing Tong secretly used Flying Dragons as a proxy to carry out crimes.
edges.evidence_quote: There were clear transfers of illegal activities to plausibly deniable associated street gangs, like in New York City where the Hip Sing Tong secretly used the Flying Dragons to carry out crimes in their stead.

descriptions: Hip Sing Tong and Four Brothers were rivals engaged in violent Tong wars.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hip Sing Tong, along with their rivals the Four Brothers and the On Leong Tong , would be involved in violent Tong wars for control of Chinatown during the early 1900s.

descriptions: Hip Sings cooperated with Kuomintang in drug trafficking operations.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1930s and 1940s, the Hip Sings were involved in drug trafficking operations with the Kuomintang (KMT) and later the Office of Policy Coordination (OPC).

descriptions: Hip Sings cooperated with Office of Policy Coordination in drug trafficking operations.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1930s and 1940s, the Hip Sings were involved in drug trafficking operations with the Kuomintang (KMT) and later the Office of Policy Coordination (OPC).

descriptions: Hip Sing Tong and On Leong Tong were rivals engaged in violent Tong wars.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hip Sing Tong, along with their rivals the Four Brothers and the On Leong Tong , would be involved in violent Tong wars for control of Chinatown during the early 1900s.

descriptions: Hip Sing Tong and On Leong Tong fought in the Tong Wars.
edges.evidence_quote: This became known as the "Tong Wars", which were a series of violent attacks between two branches of the Tong Gang, the Hip Sing Tong and On Leong Tong.

descriptions: On Leong and Hip Sing Tong fought a violent war for control of Chinatown's rackets and businesses.
edges.evidence_quote: the tong fought a violent war for control of Chinatown's rackets and businesses with the Hip Sing Tong

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CPP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

Gitans Moto Club.description: French-Canadian outlaw motorcycle gang based in Sherbrooke, Quebec, founded in 1967. Originally a street gang called the Vikings, it evolved into the Dirty Reich MC before becoming the Gitans MC in 1970. The gang controlled drug trafficking in Sherbrooke and was known for violence, robberies, and sexual assaults. It integrated into the Hells Angels in 1984, forming the Sherbrooke charter.

descriptions: Gitans MC and Atomes MC fought a turf war from 1973 to 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: Tensions between both groups eventually erupted in 1973, when a violent turf war commenced.

descriptions: After the war, Gitans and Atomes agreed to share the drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: both gangs reluctantly reached an agreement to share the city's drug market.

descriptions: Gitans MC merged into Hells Angels to become their Sherbrooke charter.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gitans Moto Club ... integrated into the larger Hells Angels Motorcycle Club (HAMC) in December 1984 to become what is now the Hells Angels MC Sherbrooke charter

descriptions: Gitans MC bought drugs from Popeye MC, who also supplied them with weapons.
edges.evidence_quote: They bought their narcotics stockpile from the Popeye Moto Club

descriptions: The Gitans MC are listed as allies of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: Alvaro mediated peace between De Stefano and Condello after the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Al termine della seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta che vide contrapposti numerose 'ndrine tra cui i De Stefano, i Condello, i Rosmini, gli Imerti, i Tegano e i Serraino per intavolare la pace fece da mediatore tra l’Avvocato Giorgio De Stefano e Pasquale Condello Domenico Alvaro

descriptions: Condello seceded from De Stefano, starting the Seconda guerra di 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: The Condello clan and De Stefano clan were on opposing sides in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: Iniziò così una delle prime due guerre di 'ndrangheta che vedeva i due schieramenti contrapposti.

descriptions: D'Agostino are allies of De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei De Stefano e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Libri is allied with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Libri sono una 'ndrina tra le più potenti di tutta Reggio Calabria alleata dei De Stefano , dei Condello e dei Tegano .

descriptions: Mancuso and De Stefano attended a meeting together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: erano presenti: Luigi Mancuso, Giuseppe De Stefano

descriptions: Paviglianiti allied with De Stefano during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta erano a fianco dei De Stefano.

descriptions: The Valle clan is linked to the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: legati ai De Stefano

descriptions: During the first 'ndrangheta war in the 1970s, the Valle clan sided with the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: erano schierati con i De Stefano

descriptions: De Stefano and Imerti were opposing sides in the Seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta : Combattuta tra il 1985 e il 1991, nacque nella città di Reggio Calabria , provocò più di 500 morti. La faida cominciò per tensioni tra Paolo De Stefano e Antonio Imerti

descriptions: De Stefano and Piromalli allied to enter narcotraffic against old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: La prima dovuta al desiderio di Giorgio De Stefano e Girolamo Piromalli d'entrare nel narcotraffico e rapimenti, osteggiati dai capi vecchi Antonio Macrì e Domenico Tripodo .

descriptions: De Stefano killed Tripodo in the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Le tensioni non tardano a scatenare il 24 novembre 1974, con l'omicidio di Giovanni De Stefano, fratello di Giorgio, poi i De Stefano reagiscono uccidendo i vecchi capi Macrì e Tripodo annientando così la vecchia guardia e la faida finisce con la vittoria dello schieramento De Stefano-Piromalli.

descriptions: De Stefano killed Macrì in the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Le tensioni non tardano a scatenare il 24 novembre 1974, con l'omicidio di Giovanni De Stefano, fratello di Giorgio, poi i De Stefano reagiscono uccidendo i vecchi capi Macrì e Tripodo annientando così la vecchia guardia e la faida finisce con la vittoria dello schieramento De Stefano-Piromalli.

descriptions: Santapaola family was closely linked with the De Stefano 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: « C’era la famiglia Santapaola che erano molto legati con le famiglie calabresi, in particolare con i De Stefano »
